title: Marathon record falls
body: The runner shattered the world marathon record on a cold morning, finishing the gruelling race in just over two hours of relentless pace.

title: Title decided in overtime
body: A dramatic overtime goal sealed the championship for the home team as fans stormed the pitch celebrating the hard fought victory.

title: Transfer window heats up
body: The football club signed a star striker for a record fee, hoping the new forward will boost their goal tally this season.

title: Tennis final thriller
body: The tennis final went to five sets, with both players trading powerful serves and baseline rallies deep into the evening.

title: Cycling tour stage win
body: The cyclist broke away on the final mountain climb, holding off the peloton to claim a memorable stage win in the tour.

title: Boxing bout ends early
body: The heavyweight boxer delivered a stunning knockout in the third round, defending his title in front of a roaring crowd.

title: Basketball playoffs begin
body: The basketball team clinched a playoff berth after a buzzer beater three pointer secured a narrow win over their rivals.

title: Swimming world record
body: The swimmer touched the wall first to set a new world record in the freestyle, dominating the pool from start to finish.

title: Cricket test match drawn
body: After five days of batting and bowling, the cricket test ended in a tense draw as bad light stopped play at the close.

title: Olympic gold for sprinter
body: The sprinter exploded out of the blocks to take Olympic gold in the hundred metres, edging out rivals by a fraction.

title: New smartphone unveiled
body: The tech company launched its latest smartphone featuring a faster chip, brighter display and an upgraded camera system.

title: AI model breaks benchmark
body: Researchers released a new language model that outperformed previous systems on reasoning benchmarks and coding tasks.

title: Cloud outage hits services
body: A major cloud provider suffered an outage that disrupted websites and apps for hours before engineers restored the servers.

title: Chip maker boosts output
body: The semiconductor firm announced a new factory to increase chip production, aiming to ease the global shortage of processors.

title: Open source project grows
body: The open source software project gained thousands of contributors after adding plugins, better documentation and faster builds.

title: Quantum computing leap
body: Scientists demonstrated a quantum processor that solved a sampling problem far faster than any classical supercomputer could.

title: Cybersecurity breach reported
body: A data breach exposed millions of user records, prompting the company to reset passwords and patch the vulnerable software.

title: Electric car software update
body: The carmaker pushed an over the air update adding self parking and longer range to its electric vehicles overnight.

title: Robotics startup funded
body: A robotics startup raised funding to build warehouse robots that pick and pack orders using computer vision and machine learning.

title: Streaming app adds features
body: The streaming platform rolled out an algorithm that recommends shows and a new interface for browsing on smart televisions.

title: Slow roasted lamb recipe
body: Rub the lamb with garlic and rosemary, then roast it slowly for hours until the meat is tender and falls off the bone.

title: Perfect sourdough loaf
body: Mix the flour and starter, let the dough ferment overnight, then bake the sourdough in a hot oven for a crisp crust.

title: Fresh summer salad
body: Toss ripe tomatoes, cucumber and basil with olive oil and a squeeze of lemon for a refreshing light summer salad.

title: Homemade pasta sauce
body: Simmer crushed tomatoes with onion, garlic and herbs for a rich pasta sauce that tastes better the longer it cooks.

title: Chocolate cake from scratch
body: Cream the butter and sugar, fold in cocoa and flour, then bake the chocolate cake until a skewer comes out clean.

title: Spicy noodle stir fry
body: Stir fry the noodles with vegetables, soy sauce and chilli over high heat for a quick and fiery weeknight dinner.

title: Creamy mushroom risotto
body: Stir the rice slowly while adding warm stock, finishing the risotto with parmesan and sauteed mushrooms for richness.

title: Grilled fish tacos
body: Grill the fish, flake it into warm tortillas, and top with cabbage slaw and lime crema for fresh and zesty tacos.

title: Berry breakfast smoothie
body: Blend frozen berries, banana and yoghurt into a thick smoothie that makes a quick and healthy breakfast on busy mornings.

title: Classic beef stew
body: Brown the beef, add carrots, potatoes and stock, then let the stew braise slowly until everything is meltingly tender.

title: Local derby ends in draw
body: The fierce local derby finished level after both teams scored late, leaving supporters on the edge of their seats.

title: Wearable tracks health
body: The new wearable device tracks heart rate, sleep and oxygen levels, syncing the data to a companion app on your phone.

title: Garlic butter shrimp
body: Saute the shrimp in garlic butter for just a few minutes, then finish with parsley and lemon for a quick seafood dish.

title: Golf major surprise
body: An unheralded golfer sank a long birdie putt on the final hole to win the major championship by a single stroke.

title: Laptop launch event
body: The company revealed a thin and light laptop with a powerful processor, long battery life and a vivid high resolution screen.

title: One pot vegetable curry
body: Simmer mixed vegetables in coconut milk and spices for a comforting one pot curry served over fluffy steamed rice.
